reviews.comment:
Único parador entre trelew y comodoro rivadavia , para reponer fuerzas y combustibles, baños limpios ,cafetería y kiosco . Buen parador las 24 hs.

(Translated by Google)
The only rest stop between Trelew and Comodoro Rivadavia, perfect for refueling and replenishing energy. It has clean restrooms, a cafeteria, and a kiosk. A good rest stop open 24 hours a day.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNJemV5SWJ3EAE

reviews.comment:
Una estacion de servisos mas en la ruta.
Los playeros muy atentos, el empleado del mink market muy mal educado y con pocas ganas de trabajar o al menos de atender bien a los clientes.
Mas alla de eso nada extraordinario

(Translated by Google)
Just another gas station on the highway.
The attendants were very helpful, but the mink market employee was very rude and seemed unwilling to work, or at least to provide good customer service. Beyond that, nothing extraordinary.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNJamFTZllBEAE
